Requirement Description: Ensure data is processed lawfully, fairly, and transparently.
Notes/Action Plan: Implement centralized logging for all data processing.

Requirement Description: Users must be able to access, modify, or delete their data upon request.
Notes/Action Plan: Automate DSAR fulfillment across all data silos.

Requirement Description: Obtain explicit, informed consent before processing personal data.
Notes/Action Plan: Maintain a global Consent Management Platform (CMP).

Requirement Description: Notify supervisory authority of data breaches within 72 hours.
Notes/Action Plan: Establish a dedicated Incident Response Team for data.

Requirement Description: Appoint a Data Protection Officer for monitoring compliance.
Notes/Action Plan: DPO role is defined in the leadership chart.

Requirement Description: Provide a clear opt-out mechanism for the sale of personal data.
Notes/Action Plan: Add "Do Not Sell My Info" to all user interfaces.

Compliance Area: CCPA - User Access and Deletion Requests
Requirement Description: Allow users to request access to or deletion of their data.
Notes/Action Plan: Integrate CCPA requests with the GDPR DSAR system.

Requirement Description: Ensure no discrimination against users for exercising their CCPA rights.
Notes/Action Plan: Conduct regular audits of the premium/free logic.

Requirement Description: Ensure a secure network infrastructure and firewall protection.
Notes/Action Plan: Quarterly penetration testing and firewall audits.

Requirement Description: Protect stored cardholder data using encryption and secure storage.
Notes/Action Plan: Use AES-256 encryption and tokenization for payments.

Requirement Description: Maintain systems for protection against malware and vulnerabilities.
Notes/Action Plan: Deploy endpoint protection and automatic patching.

Compliance Area: PCI-DSS - Implement Strong Access Control Measures
Requirement Description: Limit access to cardholder data to authorized personnel only.
Notes/Action Plan: Enforce MFA and "principle of least privilege".

Compliance Area: PCI-DSS - Regularly Monitor and Test Networks
Requirement Description: Implement systems to regularly test security measures and procedures.
Notes/Action Plan: Maintain real-time SIEM monitoring for unauthorized access.

Requirement Description: Maintain an updated information security policy for all personnel.
Notes/Action Plan: Annual mandatory security training and policy review.
